latent_structure_proposal.interpretation: The two wind maxima are latent physical structure. Passive microwave and SAR enter through separate observation operators.

passive_microwave.forbidden_interpretation: Treating a microwave convective-ring peak as a direct surface-wind maximum

cyclobs_sar.threshold_rationale: The quality and coverage thresholds follow product metadata. Peak prominence and separation thresholds isolate broad, persistent wind maxima for manual review and require validation on a sealed labeled sample before model use.

anti_leakage_rule: Every operational hindcast input must satisfy available_at_utc <= forecast_issue_time_utc. Final best-track centers are restricted to retrospective structural analysis.
label_rule: An ERC label requires a time sequence: secondary convective-ring formation, radial contraction, and replacement or loss of the inner wind maximum. A single image can supply a concentric-structure observation and a candidate label.
